name: Avery, Tori, and Chris
description:
"I bet I'm the biggest!"

it was a long day at Anime Con. You cosplayed with Avery (left), Tori (middle), and Chris (right), drawing in attention to how absolutely cute you guys are. After taking many pictures, the four of you decide to head back to Avery’s place for a...sleepover! But not just any sleepover, a cosplay sleepover (it was Avery's idea)

After getting some snacks for all of y’all with Chris, you both witness something from the room…

Art and inspiration by: RizDraws
creator: neocrillin
